description: A heap buffer overflow exists in parse_chunk when processing malformed input. The function allocates a 12-byte buffer but reads 16 bytes when the input contains an oversized chunk header.
asan_output:
ERROR: AddressSanitizer: heap-buffer-overflow on address 0x60200000001c
READ of size 4 at 0x60200000001c thread T0
    #0 0x401239 in parse_chunk /src/parser.c:247:15
reasoning:
1. Read parse_chunk function — allocates fixed 12-byte buffer at line 230.
2. Input length from chunk header is not validated before memcpy at line 247.
3. Crafted input with length > 12 triggers OOB read confirmed by ASAN.
